name: Coinbase CDP (npx)
description: Official Coinbase Developer Platform MCP server (from @coinbase/cdp-cli). Gives agents typed tool access to every CDP API endpoint - EVM/Solana accounts, onchain data, faucets, swaps, and the encode-sign-send pipeline. Tools are generated from the CDP OpenAPI spec, so new endpoints appear automatically.

inputs.label: CDP API Key ID
inputs.description: Coinbase Developer Platform API key ID (the 'key id' / name portion). Create an API key in the CDP Portal under API keys.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in at portal.cdp.coinbase.com
2. Open your project and go to API keys
3. Click 'Create API key'
4. Copy the Key ID (and the Key Secret shown only once)

inputs.label: CDP API Key Secret
inputs.description: Secret for your CDP API key. Used to sign short-lived JWTs for every request. Shown only once at key creation time - store it securely.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in at portal.cdp.coinbase.com
2. Open your project and go to API keys
3. Click 'Create API key'
4. Copy the Key Secret (displayed only once)

inputs.label: CDP Wallet Secret (optional)
inputs.description: Wallet secret required only for account WRITE operations (create account, sign, send). Read-only API and onchain-data tools work without it. Generate it in the CDP Portal Server Wallet section.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in at portal.cdp.coinbase.com
2. Go to Server Wallet > Accounts
3. Click 'Generate Wallet Secret'
4. Copy / download the wallet secret (needed only for write/sign/send operations)

auth.instructions: Create a CDP API key at portal.cdp.coinbase.com (API keys) to get CDP_KEY_ID and CDP_KEY_SECRET. For account write/sign/send operations, also generate a Wallet Secret (CDP_WALLET_SECRET) under Server Wallet.
